response.justification: Over 14 years of professional full-stack experience with a strong overlap on the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes — combined with active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at his current role, makes this candidate a high-confidence fit. The only meaningful gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin exposure, which are learnable given his demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
strengths: Direct stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes span multiple recent roles
AI agent and MCP tooling experience at current role directly matches the 'AI agent development' requirement
Deep, self-driven testing culture: built test frameworks in D, ran TDD workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD in production teams
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned — the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin absent from resume; Java appears only briefly in older embedded/tooling contexts
No Vitest or Playwright mentioned despite strong testing background — tooling familiarity unverified
